provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly item concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi equipment, visible material texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, centered item on plain dark grey background, studio lighting, elegant glowing energy sword with chrome hilt and bright blue blade, clean and pristine, ornate design, clearly inspired by Star Wars lightsaber
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, hands holding item, person, character, environmental background, multiple items, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, video game icon, UI element

judgment.explanation: Elegant glowing energy sword — lightsaber aesthetic. Star Wars iconic weapon, not grounded faction equipment.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Colors too bright or saturated — not muted/dusty
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Bright saturated colors present — violates muted/dusty rule
Reads as generic sci-fi — not faction-specific (10%)
